filters.q: ={{ $json.params.gmail_query || 'in:inbox has:attachment (filename:pdf OR filename:doc OR filename:docx) (resume OR cv OR "curriculum vitae") -from:noreply -from:no-reply newer_than:365d' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ "Interview Update | " + $json.candidate_name + " | Request " + String($json.request_id).replace(/^=/, "") }}
parameters.message:
={{ "Hi " + $json.candidate_name + "

You are shortlisted for interview.
Start: " + $json.start_time + "
End: " + $json.end_time + "
Meeting Link: " + ($json.calendar_link || 'Will be shared separately') + "

Regards,
HR Team" }}

parameters.name: top_k
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const steps = $node["Extract context"].json.steps || []; const s = steps.find((x) => x.step_id === 'shortlist'); return Number(s?.params?.top_k || 5); })() }}

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const steps = $node["Extract context"].json.steps || []; const s = steps.find((x) => x.step_id === 'shortlist'); return s?.params?.timezone || 'UTC'; })() }}

parameters.name: working_hours_start
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const steps = $node["Extract context"].json.steps || []; const s = steps.find((x) => x.step_id === 'shortlist'); return s?.params?.working_hours_start || '10:00'; })() }}

parameters.name: working_hours_end
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const steps = $node["Extract context"].json.steps || []; const s = steps.find((x) => x.step_id === 'shortlist'); return s?.params?.working_hours_end || '18:00'; })() }}

parameters.name: slot_duration_minutes
parameters.value: ={{ Number((() => { const steps = $node["Extract context"].json.steps || []; const s = steps.find((x) => x.step_id === 'shortlist'); return s?.params?.slot_duration_minutes || 30; })()) }}

parameters.name: slot_gap_minutes
parameters.value: ={{ Number((() => { const steps = $node["Extract context"].json.steps || []; const s = steps.find((x) => x.step_id === 'shortlist'); return s?.params?.slot_gap_minutes || 15; })()) }}

parameters.name: calendar_account
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const steps = $node["Extract context"].json.steps || []; const s = steps.find((x) => x.step_id === "schedule_interviews"); return s?.params?.calendar_account || "primary"; })() }}

parameters.name: freebusy_lookahead_days
parameters.value: ={{ Number((() => { const steps = $node["Extract context"].json.steps || []; const s = steps.find((x) => x.step_id === "shortlist"); return s?.params?.freebusy_lookahead_days || 14; })()) }}
